Saleor Docker Deployment Guide

This guide explains how to deploy Saleor with Docker in a few simple steps.

Prerequisites

Docker installed

Docker Compose installed

1. Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/mirumee/saleor-platform.git --recursive --jobs 3
cd saleor-platform

2. Build the Docker images
docker-compose build

3. Windows and macOS setup

If you are using Windows or macOS:

Add the saleor-platform folder to Docker’s shared directories

Allocate at least 5 GB of memory to Docker

4. Run database migrations
docker-compose run --rm api python3 manage.py migrate

5. Collect static files
docker-compose run --rm api python3 manage.py collectstatic --noinput

6. Optional: load sample data
docker-compose run --rm api python3 manage.py populatedb

7. Create an admin account
docker-compose run --rm api python3 manage.py createsuperuser

8. Start the services
docker-compose up


Saleor should now be running successfully.
